div1.entryFree: Dwelling, 1) habitation, lodging: Compl. 82. Wint. IV, 4, 740. Caes. III, 3, 26. -- 2) the country in which a man lives; home: your accent is something finer than you could purchase in so removed a d. As III, 2, 360. my name is called Vincentio, my d. Pisa, Shr. IV, 5, 55. you have here a goodly d. and a rich, H4B V, 3, 7.
